manage_sms_gateway: Easily manage all SMS gateways — activate or deactivate them anytime.
commission_base_subtitle: Choose a commission-based plan to align with your business growth. Pay only when you generate sales, making it ideal for startups or businesses focused on minimizing upfront costs. Enjoy key features like real-time sales tracking, detailed analytics, and scalable opportunities to suit your business needs.
subscription_base_subtitle: Opt for a subscription-based plan to enjoy a fixed monthly cost with access to premium features and support. This plan is perfect for businesses looking to streamline operations with tools like a POS system, self-delivery management, mobile apps, and enhanced customer engagement tools. Unlock predictable expenses with unlimited access to critical features.

system_provides_flexible_delivery: The system provides flexible delivery configuration options to match different business operations.You can choose between two delivery location modes based on your business requirements.
google_map_based_zone_system: Zone System (Google Map Based): Define delivery areas using Google Map by searching and selecting locations. This allows precise delivery coverage using map-based zones.
manage_delivery_locations_using_hierarch: State / City / Area System: Manage delivery locations using hierarchical address fields without map integration. Only one system can be active at a time. When the Zone System is enabled, map-based zone selection will be used for delivery coverage. When the Zone System is disabled, the default State, City, and Area system will be applied. Configure the selected delivery system properly before enabling live order processing.
decimal_point_no_note: Show prices without decimals – rounded to whole prices (example: 10).
